title: Melted Filipino Tuna Halo Halo
description: A cultured, gooey post-workout Filipino dish featuring sansho and yuzu cured tuna in a halo-halo format.
instructions: Wash and slice the sashimi-grade tuna into small cubes.
In a small bowl, whisk together yuzu juice, yuzu zest, and ground sansho pepper until fragrant.
Pour the yuzu-sansho mixture over the tuna cubes and let them marinate for 5 minutes.
Melt the sweetened condensed milk in a small saucepan over low heat until it becomes silky and slightly thickened.
In a tall glass, layer ice cubes, pre-cooked tapioca pearls, and sweetened red beans.
Pour the melted condensed milk over the layered ice and pearls.
Gently fold in the coconut milk, ensuring it mixes uniformly with the condensed milk.
Add the marinated tuna cubes, crushed pineapple, and toasted coconut flakes to the glass.
Sprinkle the vanilla protein powder over the top and stir lightly to combine.
Serve immediately in a chilled glass and enjoy the gooey, post-workout halo-halo.
